name: Oberon Uranium Corp.
description: Oberon Uranium Corp. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition and advancement of uranium projects. The company holds a 100% interest in the Lucky Boy uranium project, a past-producing mine located in Arizona, USA, and has previously maintained interests in other uranium properties. As of September 2025, the company announced a corporate restructuring involving a name change to New Earth Resources Corp. and a share consolidation to better align with its strategic objectives in the resource sector.
